other_observers: Glenn Walbeck , Joe Roller , + 1; Glenn first spotted the bird
description: All white winged gull , larger than adjacent Ring-billed but smaller than nearby Herring Gull . Bill somewhat slenderer than Herring , predominantly dark with small paler basal area. Floating on the water , primaries extended beyond tail , primaries same pale color as body and back. Mottling on scapulars , coverts and tertials . Pale white head , dark eye and pink legs . In flight upper wing uniform pale color , somewhat darker tail band contrasting with pale upper tail coverts.Behaviors: Strong NW wind kept bird floating in water. Occaisonally taking short flights into the wind.Call: NonePlumage: first cycle
photographer: Photographer: John Drummond, John Drummond, Johnj Drummond, John Drummond
